name: Creole Stuffed Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Heat the oil in a large skillet over low heat. Add the onion, celery, and garlic; sauté until the onion is translucent. Add the green bell pepper and continue to sauté until golden.
3. Stem the eggplants, cut each in half lengthwise, then score several times both lengthwise and across with a sharp knife. Carefully remove most of the pulp, leaving about 1/4 inch of flesh around the shell.
4. In the skillet, add the removed eggplant pulp along with all remaining ingredients except bread crumbs. Add water to moisten the mixture slightly. Simmer, covered, over low heat until the eggplant is tender, stirring occasionally.
5. Stuff each eggplant half with the cooked mixture and place them in an oiled shallow baking dish so they are secure against one another. Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until shells are tender but not collapsed.
